query:
SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS 
WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'users' AND COLUMN_NAME IN ('accountSize', 'riskPercentage', 'accountsize', 'riskpercentage');
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2Wv7ueKqB8G6f57.b62a6ae065f5 --database jFmY8c2b9B6TEBRxmcJws8 --execute SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS 
WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'users' AND COLUMN_NAME IN ('accountSize', 'riskPercentage', 'accountsize', 'riskpercentage');
stdout:
COLUMN_NAME	DATA_TYPE
accountSize	decimal
riskPercentage	decimal
